secretaryOfState.agency: Kansas Secretary of State Business Services

physicalAddresses.label: Kansas Secretary of State
physicalAddresses.street: Docking State Office Building, 915 SW Harrison Street

mailingAddress.street: Docking State Office Building, 915 SW Harrison Street

renewals.notes: Kansas LLCs file an annual report with the Secretary of State. Online fee $53; paper $55 (Form LC fee schedule). Due after tax year end — for a calendar-year entity, between January 1 and April 15. Online: https://www.kansas.gov/annual-reports/index.do

filingFacts.llcFeeNotes: Domestic Articles of Organization: $85 online / $90 paper (KS SOS Form DL fee schedule, Rev. 2/27/26).
filingFacts.nameReservationNotes: Temporary reservation of business entity name is effective for 120 days; filing fee is $35 and reservations may not be renewed (Form NR).

sources.name: Official Articles of Organization Fee Source (Form DL)
Official Annual Report Fee Source (Form LC)
